title: Updated Spawn Eggs
description: New 1.21.5 Spawn Egg textures, available in 1.21.4!
body:
Hi everyone!

With the updated Spawn Egg Textures coming out, on 1.21.5, I figured I'd make this Resource Pack, which changes their textures in version 1.21.4!

If you are having issues with downloading the or installing the texturepack, you can easily chat with me via discord: https://discord.gg/9eWqwKk

Looking for Youtubers...

If you use any part of this texturepack, ask 1st for permission.

If you want to record this video for YouTube, or Twitch, or anything else, feel free. I'd love to see it. Also, make sure to add a link to this in the description!
